landing.heroSubtitle: Whether you hire or get hired, every identity is verified, every job is monitored, and every payment is protected. Built for trust.
landing.findJobsDescription: Every operator is identity-verified with government-issued documents before accepting any assignment
landing.trackWorkDescription: Live GPS tracking, digital check-in/out, and real-time monitoring for full accountability on both sides
landing.getPaidDescription: Funds held safely until the job is done. Guaranteed payouts for providers, full refund protection for employers
landing.trustBadge: End-to-end encrypted · ID verified · Dispute protection
landing.termsAgreement: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

Hi {{firstName}},

You requested a temporary password for your Nasta account.

Your temporary password is: {{tempPassword}}

Please log in with this password and update it to a new one for security.

If you did not request this, please contact support immediately.

Best regards,
Nasta Team

referral.invitationMessage1: {{referrerName}} ({{referrerEmail}}) has invited you to join Nasta - a platform that connects talented service providers with great job opportunities!
referral.invitationMessage2: Join thousands of service providers who are already earning on Nasta. Create your profile, browse available jobs, and start earning today!
referral.invitationText:
Hi {{friendName}}!

{{referrerName}} ({{referrerEmail}}) has invited you to join Nasta - a platform that connects talented service providers with great job opportunities!

Join thousands of service providers who are already earning on Nasta. Create your profile, browse available jobs, and start earning today!

Sign up here: {{signupLink}}

This invitation was sent by {{referrerName}}. If you didn't expect this email, you can safely ignore it.

referral.benefit3: Earn rewards when you complete your first job

support.ticketCreatedMessage: Your support ticket has been created successfully.
support.subject: Subject
support.reviewMessage: We'll review your request and get back to you as soon as possible.
support.abuseReportThankYou: Thank you for taking the time to report this issue. We take all abuse reports very seriously and are committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all our users.
support.abuseReportText:
Hello {{userName}},

Thank you for taking the time to report this issue. We take all abuse reports very seriously and are committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all our users.

Your report has been received and assigned the following details:

Ticket Number: {{ticketNumber}}
Subject: {{subject}}
Priority: {{priority}}

Our team will investigate this matter promptly and thoroughly. We understand the importance of addressing these concerns quickly, and we want you to know that your safety and well-being are our top priorities.

We will review your report carefully and take appropriate action. You can expect to hear back from us within 24-48 hours regarding the status of your report.

If this is an emergency or you feel unsafe, please contact local authorities immediately.

Thank you for helping us maintain a safe community.

Best regards,
Nasta Safety Team
support.abuseReportInvestigation: Our team will investigate this matter promptly and thoroughly. We understand the importance of addressing these concerns quickly, and we want you to know that your safety and well-being are our top priorities.
support.abuseReportReview: We will review your report carefully and take appropriate action. You can expect to hear back from us within 24-48 hours regarding the status of your report.
support.emergencyContact: If this is an emergency or you feel unsafe, please contact local authorities immediately.
support.abuseReportThankYouCommunity: Thank you for helping us maintain a safe community.
support.securityReportThankYou: Thank you for reporting this security concern. We take security issues extremely seriously and appreciate your vigilance in helping us protect our platform and our users.
support.securityReportText:
Hello {{userName}},

Thank you for reporting this security concern. We take security issues extremely seriously and appreciate your vigilance in helping us protect our platform and our users.

Your security report has been received and assigned the following details:

Ticket Number: {{ticketNumber}}
Subject: {{subject}}
Priority: {{priority}}

Our security team has been immediately notified and will investigate this matter with the highest priority. We understand that security concerns require urgent attention, and we are committed to addressing this promptly.

We will conduct a thorough investigation and take all necessary measures to ensure the safety and security of our platform. You can expect to receive an update from our security team within 24-48 hours.

If you believe your account or personal information may be at risk, we recommend:
- Changing your password immediately
- Enabling two-factor authentication if available
- Monitoring your account for any suspicious activity

Thank you for your cooperation and for helping us maintain a secure environment.

Best regards,
Nasta Security Team
support.securityReportInvestigation: Our security team has been immediately notified and will investigate this matter with the highest priority. We understand that security concerns require urgent attention, and we are committed to addressing this promptly.
support.securityReportThoroughInvestigation: We will conduct a thorough investigation and take all necessary measures to ensure the safety and security of our platform. You can expect to receive an update from our security team within 24-48 hours.
support.securityReportRecommendations: If you believe your account or personal information may be at risk, we recommend:
support.securityRecommendation3: Monitoring your account for any suspicious activity
support.securityReportThankYouCooperation: Thank you for your cooperation and for helping us maintain a secure environment.
support.surveyThankYouSubheader: Your feedback means the world to us
support.surveyThankYouMessage: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your valuable feedback with us! Your insights as a {{roleName}} are incredibly important to us and help us make Nasta a better platform for everyone.
support.surveyThankYouText:
Hello {{userName}},

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your valuable feedback with us! Your insights as a {{roleName}} are incredibly important to us and help us make Nasta a better platform for everyone.

We truly appreciate your thoughtful responses and the time you dedicated to completing our survey. Your feedback will be carefully reviewed by our team, and we'll use it to:

• Improve our services and features
• Enhance your experience on the platform
• Address any areas that need attention
• Continue building a platform that serves you better

Your voice matters, and we're grateful that you chose to share it with us. We're committed to listening to your feedback and making meaningful improvements based on what you've told us.

If you have any additional thoughts or suggestions in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're always here to listen.

Thank you again for being such an important part of the Nasta community!

Warm regards,
The Nasta Team
support.surveyAppreciation: We truly appreciate your thoughtful responses and the time you dedicated to completing our survey. Your feedback will be carefully reviewed by our team, and we'll use it to:
support.surveyUse2: Enhance your experience on the platform
support.surveyUse3: Address any areas that need attention
support.surveyUse4: Continue building a platform that serves you better
support.surveyVoiceMatters: Your voice matters, and we're grateful that you chose to share it with us. We're committed to listening to your feedback and making meaningful improvements based on what you've told us.
support.surveyAdditionalThoughts: If you have any additional thoughts or suggestions in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're always here to listen.
support.surveyThankYouCommunity: Thank you again for being such an important part of the Nasta community! 💙
support.responseThankYou: Thank you for contacting Nasta support.
support.responseFurtherQuestions: If you have any further questions, please reply to this email or reference your ticket number: {{ticketNumber}}

jobs.jobReferralSubject: {{employerName}} referred you to a job opportunity on Nasta
jobs.jobReferralMessage: {{employerName}} ({{employerEmail}}) has referred you to a job opportunity on Nasta that might be a great fit for your skills!
jobs.jobReferralFooter: This referral was sent by {{employerName}}. If you didn't expect this email, you can safely ignore it.
jobs.applicationSubmittedMessage: Great news! Your application has been submitted successfully.
jobs.applicationSubmittedText:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" with {{employerName}} has been submitted successfully.

Location: {{jobLocation}}

We'll notify you once the employer reviews your application.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
jobs.applicationStatusMessage: The employer will review your application and get back to you soon. We'll notify you when there's an update.
jobs.nextStep1: Wait for the employer to review your application
jobs.nextStep4: Keep your profile updated to increase your chances
jobs.applicationAcceptedMessage: We're thrilled to inform you that your application for "{{jobTitle}}" with {{employerName}} has been accepted!
jobs.applicationAcceptedEmailSubject: Congratulations! Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" has been accepted
jobs.acceptedNextStep1: The employer will contact you shortly with next steps
jobs.acceptedNextStep2: Check your notifications for any updates
jobs.acceptedNextStep3: You can also chat with the employer directly through Nasta
jobs.applicationRejectedMessage: Thank you for your interest in the position "{{jobTitle}}" with {{employerName}}. After careful consideration, we have decided to move forward with other candidates at this time.
jobs.keepGoingMessage: Don't be discouraged. This is just one opportunity, and there are many more waiting for you on Nasta.
jobs.rejectedNextStep2: Keep your profile updated and complete
jobs.rejectedNextStep3: Apply to positions that match your skills
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneMessage: The service provider ({{applicantName}}) has marked the job "{{jobTitle}}" as done.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneText:
Hello {{employerName}},

The service provider ({{applicantName}}) has marked the job "{{jobTitle}}" as done.

Please review and mark the job as complete to finalize the payment.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneReviewMessage: The service provider has completed their work and is ready for your review. Please verify the completion and mark the job as complete to finalize the payment.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneNextSteps: Review the completed work and mark the job as complete in your dashboard to proceed with payment.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneFooter: Once you mark the job as complete, the payment process will be finalized according to your payment terms.
jobs.newJobMatchText:
A new job "{{jobTitle}}" matches your skills and is near you in {{city}}.
Address: {{location}}
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableMessage: We wanted to inform you that the job "{{jobTitle}}" is no longer available.
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableText:
Hello {{applicantName}},

We wanted to inform you that the job "{{jobTitle}}" is no longer available.

Reason: {{reason}}

You can still browse other jobs from different employers or explore different opportunities on our platform.

We appreciate your interest and encourage you to continue applying to other positions.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableBrowse: You can still browse other jobs from different employers or explore different opportunities on our platform.
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableAppreciate: We appreciate your interest and encourage you to continue applying to other positions.
jobs.applicationWithdrawnMessage: {{applicantName}} has withdrawn their application for the job "{{jobTitle}}".
jobs.applicationWithdrawnText:
Hello {{employerName}},

{{applicantName}} has withdrawn their application for the job "{{jobTitle}}".

Reason: {{reason}}

You can still browse other applications for this job or post new jobs.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
jobs.applicationWithdrawnBrowse: You can still browse other applications for this job or post new jobs.

employer.introText: To help us improve your experience, please take 2 minutes to share feedback about your recent service order. Your input is highly valued.
employer.question1: 1. What type of service have you ordered?
employer.question2: 2. Overall, how satisfied were you with the service you received?
employer.question2Hint: (Scale: 1 – Very Dissatisfied, 2 – Dissatisfied, 3 – Neutral, 4 – Satisfied, 5 – Very Satisfied)
employer.question3: 3. How likely are you to recommend Nasta to a friend or colleague?
employer.question4: 4. How would you rate your service provider on the following?
employer.question5: 5. Did the service provider have all the necessary tools/equipment to complete the job?
employer.question6: 6. Was the service completed within the expected time?
employer.question7: 7. How easy was it to book the service through the app?
employer.question8: 8. What did you like most about the service experience?
employer.question9: 9. What could we improve to make your next experience better?
employer.question10: 10. What other types of services would you like to see on Nasta in the future?

serviceProvider.introTitle: Thank you for being part of Nasta!
serviceProvider.introText: Your feedback helps us improve the platform for all service providers. Please take a few minutes to share your experience.
serviceProvider.question1: 1. Overall, how satisfied are you with the Nasta platform?
serviceProvider.question1Hint: (Scale: 1 – Very Dissatisfied, 2 – Dissatisfied, 3 – Neutral, 4 – Satisfied, 5 – Very Satisfied)
serviceProvider.question2: 2. How likely are you to recommend Nasta to other service providers?
serviceProvider.question3: 3. How would you rate the availability of job opportunities on the platform?
serviceProvider.question4: 4. How satisfied are you with the payment process and payout timeline?
serviceProvider.question5: 5. How would you rate communication with employers through the platform?
serviceProvider.question6: 6. How easy is it to use the Nasta app for service providers?
serviceProvider.question7: 7. How would you rate the quality of support you receive from Nasta?
serviceProvider.question8: 8. What do you like most about working with Nasta?
serviceProvider.question9: 9. What could we improve to make your experience better?
serviceProvider.question10: 10. What features or improvements would you like to see on the platform in the future?
serviceProvider.question10Placeholder: e.g., Better job matching, scheduling tools, etc.
